# Multiplication → Split Multiply-Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Multiplication → Split Multiply-Subtract

Split Multiply-Subtract

Instruction Type and Width               Instruction description
                                         Performs two independent sets of complex multiplication and
                                         subtraction between two complex numbers. Each complex
Vector Split Complex Multiply-Subtract   source consists of real 16-bit part and imaginary 16-bit part. The
                                         real and the imaginary products, 32-bit each, are sign extended

and subtracted with the destinations respectively, 40-bit each.
